instruction: The green checkmark on this h2 icon drifted. Put it back exactly where it belongs.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/h2.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21.75 19.5H16.5v-1.609a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 1.244-2.012l2.89-1.445c.651-.326 1.116-.955 1.116-1.683 0-.498-.04-.987-.118-1.463-.135-.825-.835-1.422-1.668-1.489a15.202 15.202 0 0 0-3.464.12M2.243 4.492v7.5m0 0v7.502m0-7.501h10.5m0-7.5v7.5m0 0v7.501"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,4 98,14 114,-2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/h2.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21.75 19.5H16.5v-1.609a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 1.244-2.012l2.89-1.445c.651-.326 1.116-.955 1.116-1.683 0-.498-.04-.987-.118-1.463-.135-.825-.835-1.422-1.668-1.489a15.202 15.202 0 0 0-3.464.12M2.243 4.492v7.5m0 0v7.502m0-7.501h10.5m0-7.5v7.5m0 0v7.501"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
